title: Soul Glow
description: Adds Blue variants of Glowstone, lamps and more
body:
![Soul Glow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/153b2815997e64525b95ee37317bf6ca21955c8d.png)
-

Soul Glow is even on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/soul-glow)


Soul Glow adds Wireless-redstone, Teleporters, Portable Teleporters, Soul  Glowstone and an Easter-Egg :D

![Soul Redstone Lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a4304812d25672eace168483b9186bbb1d32f6f.png)
-

Use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) for Mod-Tutorials

**THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB**
